user_input: Can you provide detailed information about the services offered by Mia at Maison Lumiere, including the types of haircuts, coloring options, and any special treatments available?
reference_contexts: # Hair Salon – Business Information ## Salon name and location **Maison Lumiere** 123 Newbury Street, Boston, MA 02116 ## Business hours The salon is open: - Monday to Friday: 9:00–18:00 - Saturday: 9:00–16:00 - Sunday: closed ## Stylists **Mia** — Senior stylist specializing in cuts, color, and balayage. Available for all services. Services, Duration, and Descriptions Haircuts Women’s Haircut — 45 minutes Includes consultation, hair wash, precision cutting, and basic styling. Suitable for maintaining shape, refreshing layers, or a complete style change. Men’s Haircut — 30 minutes A tailored haircut including consultation, clipper and scissor work, and light styling. Ideal for classic cuts, fades, and modern styles. Children’s Haircut (under 12) — 25 minutes A gentle and efficient haircut designed to keep children comfortable. Includes basic shaping and optional light styling. ⸻ Coloring Root Touch-Up — 60 minutes Covers regrowth at the roots to match the existing hair color. Recommended every 4–6 weeks to maintain a consistent look. Full Hair Coloring — 90 minutes Applies a single color from roots to ends for a complete color refresh or change. Includes consultation to select the best shade for your skin tone. Highlights — 120 minutes Adds lighter strands throughout the hair to create dimension and brightness. Can be customized for subtle or bold contrast. Balayage — 150 minutes A hand-painted highlighting technique that creates a natural, sun-kissed effect with soft transitions. Low-maintenance and ideal for a modern look. ⸻ Styling Blow-Dry — 30 minutes Hair is washed and styled using professional blow-drying techniques to create volume, smoothness, or soft waves. Wash & Style — 40 minutes Includes hair washing followed by styling with brushes and heat tools for a polished everyday look. Formal Updo — 60 minutes An elegant hairstyle suitable for special events such as weddings, galas, and celebrations. Includes consultation and secure styling. Bridal Hairstyling — 90 minutes A customized hairstyle for brides, including trial consultation (if pre-booked), detailed styling, and long-lasting finishing techniques. ⸻ Treatments Deep Conditioning Treatment — 30 minutes Restores moisture and improves hair softness using intensive nourishing products. Recommended for dry or damaged hair. Keratin Treatment — 120 minutes A smoothing treatment that reduces frizz, enhances shine, and makes hair more manageable for up to several months. Scalp Treatment — 20 minutes A targeted treatment designed to soothe irritation, reduce dandruff, and promote a healthy scalp environment. ## 💲
reference: Mia, the senior stylist at Maison Lumiere, offers a variety of services including haircuts, coloring, and treatments. For haircuts, she provides a women's haircut that lasts 45 minutes, which includes consultation, hair wash, precision cutting, and basic styling. There is also a men's haircut available for 30 minutes, tailored with consultation and clipper and scissor work. For children under 12, a gentle haircut is offered, taking 25 minutes. In terms of coloring, Mia can perform a root touch-up in 60 minutes, a full hair coloring in 90 minutes, highlights in 120 minutes, and balayage in 150 minutes. Additionally, she offers treatments such as a deep conditioning treatment for 30 minutes, a keratin treatment lasting 120 minutes, and a scalp treatment for 20 minutes.

user_input: What is the price for a Children’s Haircut at your salon, and do you offer any special deals for this service?
reference_contexts: Service Prices (USD) ### Haircuts - Women’s Haircut — $35 - Men’s Haircut — $20 - Children’s Haircut (under 12) — $15 ### Coloring - Root Touch-Up — $60 - Full Hair Coloring — $90 - Highlights — $120 - Balayage — $160 ### Styling - Blow-Dry — $25 - Wash & Style — $30 - Formal Updo — $55 - Bridal Hairstyling — $120 ### Treatments - Deep Conditioning Treatment — $25 - Keratin Treatment — $180 - Scalp Treatment — $20 --- ## ⬆️ Upsells and 📦 Bundle deals (add-ons when booked with another service) When you book any haircut or coloring service, you can add these at a reduced price: - **Blow-Dry add-on** — $15 (regular $25) when added to any haircut or coloring - **Deep Conditioning add-on** — $15 (regular $25) when added to coloring or keratin - **Scalp Treatment add-on** — $12 (regular $20) when added to any service Upsell prices apply only when the add-on is booked in the same visit as a qualifying service. The assistant can offer these when confirming a booking. These bundle deals must be booked as a single appointment. Total duration is summed duration of single services making the bundle. --- ## 💡 Pricing Notes - Prices may vary depending on hair length and thickness. - Bridal services may require a trial session, which is priced separately. - Discounts may be available for combined services booked in the same visit. - A consultation is included with all coloring services. --- ## 🧾 Example Price Estimates - Women’s haircut + blow-dry: approximately $60 - Full coloring + deep conditioning: approximately $115 - Balayage + toner + styling: approximately $190–$220 --- ## 💬 Pricing FAQs Do you offer student discounts? Occasional seasonal promotions may include student discounts. Please ask when booking. Are consultations free? Consultations are free when booking a service. Do prices include styling? Basic styling is included with haircuts, but advanced styling (e.g., formal updos) is priced separately. Do you have add-ons or bundles? Yes. We offer upsells (e.g. blow-dry or deep conditioning at a discount when added to another service) and bundle deals (e.g. Cut & Style, Color & Care). Ask for details when booking. --- Thank you for reviewing our pricing. Please contact us if you would like a personalized quote. ## Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ) ### Appointments & Booking Do I need an appointment? Yes, appointments are recommended for all services to ensure availability. Walk-ins are accepted only if time allows. How can I book an appointment? You can book by phone, email, or through our AI booking assistant. Please provide your name, phone number, desired service, and preferred date and time. Can I book on the same day? Yes, same-day bookings are possible if time slots are available. How far in advance should I book? We recommend booking at least 2–3 days in advance for standard services and at least one week in advance for bridal or balayage services. --- ### Changes & Cancellations Can I reschedule my appointment? Yes, appointments can be rescheduled up to 2 hours before the scheduled time. What is your cancellation policy? Cancellations made less than 2 hours before the appointment may incur a cancellation fee. What happens if I miss my appointment? No-shows may result in restrictions on future bookings. --- ### Timing & Arrival What if I arrive late? If you arrive more than 15 minutes late, we may need to shorten or reschedule your appointment. How long does each service take? Service durations vary. For example, a women’s haircut takes about 45 minutes, while balayage may take up to 150 minutes. Can I combine multiple services in one visit? Yes, but please mention this when booking so we can allocate enough time. --- ### Services & Recommendations Which service is best for dry or damaged hair? We recommend a Deep Conditioning Treatment to restore moisture and improve hair health. What is the difference between balayage and highlights? Balayage is a hand-painted technique that creates a natural, blended look, while highlights use foils to create more defined contrast. Do you offer services for frizzy hair? Yes, our Keratin Treatment helps reduce frizz and makes hair smoother and more manageable. Do you offer children’s haircuts? Yes, we provide gentle and efficient haircuts for children under 12. --- ### Payments & Policies What payment methods do you accept? We accept cash and major credit/debit cards. Do you offer refunds? Refunds are not provided for completed services, but please contact us if you are unsatisfied so we can find a solution. Can I bring a photo of the hairstyle I want? Absolutely. Reference photos help our stylists understand your expectations. --- ### Salon Experience Is there parking available? Street parking is available near the salon, and a public parking garage is located two minutes away. Is the salon suitable for people with allergies or sensitive skin? Please inform us of any allergies. We offer gentle products and can adjust treatments accordingly. Can I bring a friend or child with me? Yes, but please ensure they do not disturb other clients. --- Thank you for choosing Maison Lumiere. If you have any additional questions, feel free to contact us.
reference: The price for a Children’s Haircut (for children under 12) at our salon is $15. Additionally, we offer upsells and bundle deals when booking other services, but specific deals for children's haircuts are not mentioned in the context.

Basic styling is included with haircuts, but advanced styling (e.g., formal updos) is priced separately. Do you have add-ons or bundles? Yes. We offer upsells (e.g. blow-dry or deep conditioning at a discount when added to another service) and bundle deals (e.g. Cut & Style, Color & Care). Ask for details when booking. --- Thank you for reviewing our pricing. Please contact us if you would like a personalized quote. ## Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ) ### Appointments & Booking Do I need an appointment? Yes, appointments are recommended for all services to ensure availability. Walk-ins are accepted only if time allows. How can I book an appointment? You can book by phone, email, or through our AI booking assistant. Please provide your name, phone number, desired service, and preferred date and time. Can I book on the same day? Yes, same-day bookings are possible if time slots are available. How far in advance should I book? We recommend booking at least 2–3 days in advance for standard services and at least one week in advance for bridal or balayage services. --- ### Changes & Cancellations Can I reschedule my appointment? Yes, appointments can be rescheduled up to 2 hours before the scheduled time. What is your cancellation policy? Cancellations made less than 2 hours before the appointment may incur a cancellation fee. What happens if I miss my appointment? No-shows may result in restrictions on future bookings. --- ### Timing & Arrival What if I arrive late? If you arrive more than 15 minutes late, we may need to shorten or reschedule your appointment. How long does each service take? Service durations vary. For example, a women’s haircut takes about 45 minutes, while balayage may take up to 150 minutes. Can I combine multiple services in one visit? Yes, but please mention this when booking so we can allocate enough time. --- ### Services & Recommendations Which service is best for dry or damaged hair? We recommend a Deep Conditioning Treatment to restore moisture and improve hair health. What is the difference between balayage and highlights? Balayage is a hand-painted technique that creates a natural, blended look, while highlights use foils to create more defined contrast. Do you offer services for frizzy hair? Yes, our Keratin Treatment helps reduce frizz and makes hair smoother and more manageable. Do you offer children’s haircuts? Yes, we provide gentle and efficient haircuts for children under 12. --- ### Payments & Policies What payment methods do you accept? We accept cash and major credit/debit cards. Do you offer refunds? Refunds are not provided for completed services, but please contact us if you are unsatisfied so we can find a solution. Can I bring a photo of the hairstyle I want? Absolutely. Reference photos help our stylists understand your expectations. --- ### Salon Experience Is there parking available? Street parking is available near the salon, and a public parking garage is located two minutes away. Is the salon suitable for people with allergies or sensitive skin? Please inform us of any allergies. We offer gentle products and can adjust treatments accordingly. Can I bring a friend or child with me? Yes, but please ensure they do not disturb other clients. --- Thank you for choosing Maison Lumiere. If you have any additional questions, feel free to contact us.
reference: The Deep Conditioning Treatment is recommended for restoring moisture and improving hair health, especially for dry or damaged hair. It costs $25, but if you add it to a coloring service, you can get it for $15.
